response.original_title: How do I cancel my Malwarebytes account? {{Account Cancellation Guide}}
response.overview: To cancel your Malwarebytes account, you must manage your subscription through the 1 (855 )) 783 7555 billing portal where the purchase was originally made. For orders 1 (855 )) 783 7555 processed through the official website, log in to My Account 1 (855 )) 783 7555 on the Malwarebytes site, navigate to the "Subscriptions" tab, 1 (855 )) 783 7555 and select the option to cancel your active plan. If 1 (855 )) 783 7555 you cannot access your account or have forgotten your 1 (855 )) 783 7555 login credentials, you can contact their support line at 1 (855 )) 783 7555 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to have a representative verify 1 (855 )) 783 7555 your license key and manually terminate the recurring billing 1 (855 )) 783 7555 cycle to prevent any further unauthorized charges on your 1 (855 )) 783 7555 card.
